name: Cash Paradise # 1
description_short: Miami-based jewelry repair and pawn shop specializing in watch repairs and jewelry services with competitive pricing and Latino-owned operations.
description_long:
Cash Paradise # 1 is a pawn shop and jewelry repair establishment located at 6767 W Flagler St in Miami-Dade County, Florida. The business operates as a Latino-owned establishment that has built its reputation in the local community through personalized service and accessibility. The shop maintains extended hours from 8:00 A.M. to 7:00 P.M. daily (with Sunday opening at 10:00 A.M.), making it convenient for customers in the Miami area seeking pawn or jewelry services.

The company specializes in jewelry repair, watch repairs, battery replacements, and resizing services. Cash Paradise # 1 also buys used goods and offers pawn loans on collateral items, with particular emphasis on jewelry and watches. The business accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, NFC mobile payments, and checks. The facility provides wheelchair-accessible seating and restrooms, positioning itself as an inclusive service provider.

Customers consistently highlight the friendly and attentive staff, with particular praise for the owner's customer service approach and willingness to explain services thoroughly. The business is known for competitive pricing on both pawn valuations and repair services, with reviewers noting quick turnaround times for repairs like battery replacements. The welcoming environment and personalized attention to individual clients create a reputation for treating customers like family, which has generated repeat business and word-of-mouth referrals.

However, the business faces some operational concerns. Security practices regarding stolen property verification have been questioned in customer feedback, with at least one reported incident involving an iPhone linked to theft. Additionally, pawn valuations have occasionally been criticized for being lower than expected compared to scrap value, suggesting potential transparency gaps in how items are assessed. The business profile on the listing service also shows an unverified ownership status, meaning the owner has not completed identity verification through the platform.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Competitive pricing on jewelry repairs, watch services, and pawn valuations compared to competitors
Quick turnaround time for repairs including battery replacements and jewelry resizing
Extended hours of operation (8 A.M. - 7 P.M. weekdays, 10 A.M. - 7 P.M. Sunday) for customer convenience
Wheelchair-accessible facilities including seating and restrooms
Latino-owned business with strong community reputation and personalized customer service
Accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments
Free parking lot available for customer use
cons: Security concerns regarding verification of stolen property, with at least one reported incident involving a linked iPhone
Pawn valuations occasionally lower than scrap value, indicating potential lack of transparency in item assessment
Owner/representative has not completed verification process on the listing platform
Limited documented reviews (platform shows 0 reviews despite customer feedback summary), limiting independent verification of current service quality
Miscategorization as 'Vocational & Technical Schools' on the Wheree platform suggests inaccurate business classification in some directories
best_for: Miami-area residents seeking jewelry repair and watch service with quick turnaround times
Individuals looking to pawn jewelry or watches for emergency cash loans
Customers valuing personalized service and community-focused, Latino-owned businesses
diagnosis: Cash Paradise # 1 is best for Miami residents needing affordable jewelry repairs, watch services, or pawn loans who value personalized, family-oriented service from a Latino-owned business. Primary caveat: customers should verify the legitimacy of items before pawning due to documented security concerns about stolen property handling, and should negotiate pawn valuations carefully as assessments may be below scrap value.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry and watches
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
